title: cacalia alpestris
intro: Cacalia alpestris, also known as Edible Cacalia or Alpine Cacalia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cacalia alpestris include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antispasmodic to alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cacalia alpestris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
